task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface or Administration workspace is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New User' or 'Add User' form is open within the Administration > Users panel.

task_completion.description: Enter the new user's basic details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user creation form fields are filled with Name: 'Maya Chen', Username: 'maya.chen', and Email: 'maya.chen@rocketchat.local'.

task_completion.description: Configure user role and status toggles
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user form, the 'Verified' toggle is checked/ON, 'Require password change' is unchecked/OFF, 'Send welcome email' is unchecked/OFF, and the role is set to 'user'.

task_completion.description: Save and create the new user
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user 'Maya Chen' (maya.chen) is visible in the saved Users list in the Administration panel, confirming the account was created.

task_completion.description: Add the new user to the #release-updates channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '#release-updates' channel is open and 'Maya Chen' is visible in the channel's Members list, or a system message in the chat indicates she was added to the channel.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within a web browser showing the Rocket.Chat UI, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive interaction with the Rocket.Chat UI (typing in forms, clicking menus, toggling switches) rather than pasting a pre-made HTML page or text document.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database or backend shortcuts
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open executing MongoDB commands or curl requests to bypass the standard UI user creation process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Name: Maya Chen. Target Username: maya.chen. Target Email: maya.chen@rocketchat.local. Target Channel: release-updates.
